message:
feat(interactive): implement triggerTurn for idle TUI extension messages (bd-2td49)

When an extension called pi.sendMessage() with triggerTurn: true while the
TUI agent was idle, the flag was silently discarded. This implements the
missing continuation semantics that the legacy TypeScript Pi honored:

- Add PendingInput::Continue variant to represent continuation without
  synthesizing a new user message
- Wire ext_session idle delivery to enqueue Continue for steer/followUp
  modes (but correctly skip for nextTurn delivery)
- Add submit_continue() agent method that re-runs the LLM with existing
  context only, mirroring submit_message()/submit_content() structure
- Refactor test infrastructure: extract build_test_app_with_provider()
  and runtime()/runtime_handle() for reuse
- Add ContinueProbeProvider for verifying no user message is fabricated
- Comprehensive test coverage for both trigger and no-trigger paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
